commit.message:
fix: rocMLIR-7.1.1-r6 build fat static archive with upstream install

The thin shared library (libMLIRRockThin.so) doesn't contain the full
MLIR/LLVM symbols needed by consumers. Switch to the fat static
archive (BUILD_FAT_LIBROCKCOMPILER=ON) which bundles everything into
a self-contained librockCompiler.a and uses upstream's own install
rules for headers, cmake config, and export targets.

commit.message:
ci: fix release workflow — move secrets checks to job-level env vars

GitHub Actions does not support `secrets.*` context in `if:` expressions.
Move all `secrets.X != ''` checks to job-level `env:` as boolean env vars
(HAS_APPLE_CERT, HAS_APPLE_ID, HAS_WIN_CERT, HAS_GPG_KEY), then reference
`env.HAS_X` in step `if:` conditions.

Also add `if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')` guards on all jobs so
branch pushes never queue jobs and show spurious failures.

commit.message:
fix(tiering): fix flaky op_manager_test by waiting for cancelled stash IOs (#6852)

WaitForPendingStashes only checked pending_stash_cnt, which tracks
version-matching stash completions. Cancelled stash IOs (superseded
by newer stashes for the same id) could still be in flight, leaving
allocated_bytes inflated when the assertion ran. Also wait for
pending_ops to drain so all IO callbacks (including cancellation
frees) complete before checking allocated_bytes.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(test): update musicfetch-enrichment tests to expect throws not error returns (#5670)

The implementation was updated (JOV-1493) to throw on missing token and no API data
so jobs fail and retry rather than silently succeed. The tests still expected the old
error-return behavior, causing CI to fail on every main push.

Updated two tests to use `rejects.toThrow()` assertions:
- 'throws when MusicFetch is unavailable'
- 'throws when MusicFetch API returns no data'

commit.message:
Add title+date matching strategy to ce-import-galleries

Third matching strategy for galleries that lack both SHA256 hashes and
CE URLs. Normalizes titles (strip + lowercase) and joins on title+date
within studio scope. Skips ambiguous matches on both CE and Stash sides.
Also refactors shared data fetching so studio galleries and CE releases
are fetched once and passed to all three strategies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add AppTypography and introduce Plus Jakarta Sans / Inter font pairing

Create FrontEnd/lib/config/app_typography.dart as the single source of
truth for all text styles. All GoogleFonts.inter() calls removed from
theme.dart — it now references AppTypography.* constants instead.

Font pairing:
- Plus Jakarta Sans (w700–w800, tight letter-spacing) for display,
  headline, title, and app bar — expressive at large sizes
- Inter for body, labels, buttons, inputs, nav, chips — legible at
  small sizes

Body line-height bumped 1.5→1.6 for a more airy, editorial feel.
Verified: flutter analyze — no issues.

Add PostHog analytics, marketing pixels (Meta, Google Ads, LinkedIn, RB2B), and conversion tracking

- Meta Pixel: Facebook/Instagram retargeting and Lead conversion events
- Google Ads Tag: gtag.js with conversion tracking for contact form submissions
- LinkedIn Insight Tag: B2B retargeting (ready for partner ID)
- RB2B: Visitor identification for anonymous traffic (free tier, 150/month)
- All pixels env-var gated — silently skip if not configured
- Contact form fires trackConversion('lead') across all active pixels

commit.message:
feat: 분석 파이프라인 Round-Robin 병렬 배치 방식으로 전환

기존 카테고리 순차 실행(물가->고용->...->부동산)에서
Round-Robin 병렬 배치 방식으로 변경하여 모든 카테고리를
골고루 분석하도록 개선.

- pipeline.ts: runRoundRobin 로직 구현 (chunkSize=10, 카테고리별
  번갈아 배치 구성 후 concurrency로 병렬 API 호출)
- 적응형 타임아웃: aggregate에 60초 확보 (MAX_ANALYSIS_MS=240초)
- article-analyzer.ts: 핵심 함수 export (getUnanalyzedArticles,
  analyzeWithRetry, saveAnalysis, runConcurrent)
- constants.ts: ANALYSIS_STEPS 5개 카테고리 -> "analysis" 1단계 통합
- route.ts: totalSteps 계산 조정, progress 이벤트에 detail 추가
- analysis-progress-modal.tsx: 통합 step의 카테고리별 breakdown 파싱
- news-page.tsx: buildAnalysisSteps/mock/SSE 핸들러 동기화

commit.message:
Improve blog loading performance

- Route-based code splitting with React.lazy + Suspense
- Vite manual chunks: split react, markdown, framer-motion, supabase
- Compress profile.jpg (1.8MB → 148KB) and paper images
- Add loading="lazy" + decoding="async" to all images
- Memoize BlogCard with React.memo, filteredPosts with useMemo
- Add 1-min SWR-style cache for getPosts()
- Parallelize alternate-language post fetch with Promise.all
- Throttle Navbar scroll listener with requestAnimationFrame

Add dynamic stock list with Yahoo Finance sync

- exchange_stocks table stores dynamically discovered stocks
- sync-exchange-stocks edge function searches Yahoo Finance with
  200+ query patterns to discover all .ST tickers (~167 found)
- Frontend prioritizes DB table, falls back to hardcoded seed list
- Hardcoded list in exchangeStocks.ts acts as fallback only
- Sync caches for 24h, can be re-triggered to pick up new IPOs

commit.message:
feat(TAG): overhaul prompt to v2.0 with full MVC improvements

- Fix STATE_SCHEMA JSON validity: quoted keys, objects instead of arrays
  for locations/npcs/objects, added missing player z-coordinate
- Fix broken XML tags: </SESSION_LOOP> and </DIRECTIVES> in CONSOLE_COMMANDS
- Add combat system: d20 resolution, difficulty scaling, flee mechanic,
  NPC death with loot drop, relationship impact
- Add death and game over rules: player death condition, permadeath with
  one-turn rewind
- Add IN_PROMPT_CONTEXT with typed input slots (player_name, setting,
  lore, goal, savegame)
- Add time and world clock mechanics with period mapping and NPC behaviour
- Add difficulty scale (Easy/Normal/Hard/Brutal) with dynamic adjustment
- Add scoring system with scoring_ledger and max_score
- Fix duplicate VIEW templates: ENDING and CONSOLE now have distinct layouts
- Rename AUTO_HEALING step to VALIDATE_AND_RESOLVE
- Move <BOTS> inside <CONTROLLER> for correct ownership
- Add version="2.0" and api_role="system" to MASTER_PROMPT
- Add canonical flag examples to item, object, and NPC schemas
- Update SemantiCode optimized prompt to reflect all changes (v2)
